summary: The user is planning to utilize their morning free time, specifically around 6:45 am, to enhance productivity and learn French. They expressed interest in using the Duolingo app for language learning and sought recommendations for additional resources and tips for engaging in a language exchange with a native French speaker.
facts: The user wakes up at 6:30 am on weekdays and has free time after breakfast before attending to daily responsibilities. The user is interested in learning French and plans to use the Duolingo app to aid their language learning. The user intends to set a daily goal and focus on understanding the material while using Duolingo. The user is considering starting a language exchange with a native French speaker to improve their speaking skills. The user is looking for tips on how to make the most out of a language exchange.
